privileged_info_summary: The concert_stage_plot_input_list task requires creating a draw.io stage plot and input list for the band 'The Midnight Alibi'. Files are saved to /home/ga/Desktop with filenames midnight_alibi_rider.drawio and midnight_alibi_rider.png. The task provides a synthetically generated band_requirements.txt file at setup time containing the stage layout specifications, monitor needs, and a 10-channel input list with real microphone models (Shure Beta 91A, SM57, Sennheiser e604, e906, Radial J48, Electro-Voice RE20, Radial ProD2, Shure Beta 58A). The verifier validates file existence, XML parsing, presence of instrument keywords (drums, bass, guitar, keys), correct spatial positioning (drums rear/upstage, lead vocals front/downstage, bass stage right, guitar stage left), specific microphone model names, and channel numbers 1-10. The metadata fields 'min_shapes' (5) and 'min_text_labels' (15) are not validated by the verifier and their accuracy cannot be confirmed.
